026import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
027import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils.*;
028import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.PredicateUtils.*;
029import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
030import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.eq;
031import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
032import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;

037import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.RestUtils.*;

039import java.io.*;

042import java.lang.reflect.Method;

051import org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.OpenApi;
052import org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.*;
053import org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter.*;
054import org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger.Swagger;

056import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
057import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.MediaType;
058import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;

060import org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.Logger;
061import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
062import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ParameterInfo;

069import org.apache.juneau.http.Response;
070import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
071import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;

073import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
074import org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders.*;

076import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
077import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
078import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
079import org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi.*;
080import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;

086import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug.format.*;
087import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart.*;
088import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
089import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.*;
090import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi.*;
091import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;

093import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
094import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile.*;
095import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats.*;
096import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger.*;

101
102import jakarta.servlet.*;
103import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
104
105/**
106 * Defines the initial configuration of a <c>RestServlet</c> or <c>@Rest</c> annotated object.
107 *
108 * <p>
109 * An extension of the {@link ServletConfig} object used during servlet initialization.
110 *
111 * <p>
112 * Configuration is supplied declaratively through the {@link Rest @Rest} annotation on the resource class
113 * (and inherited from any parent classes), and programmatically through {@link Bean @Bean}-annotated
114 * methods/fields that contribute named beans (e.g. <c>encoders</c>, <c>parsers</c>, <c>callLogger</c>) to the REST
115 * resource's bean store. Where direct construction is needed (test rigs, mock clients, embedded usage),
116 * the public constructor takes a {@link RestContext.Args} record carrying the bootstrap state.
117 *
118 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
119 * <p class='bjava'>
120 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(path=<js>"/myresource"</js>, serializers=JsonSerializer.<jk>class</jk>, parsers=JsonParser.<jk>class</jk>)
121 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyResource {
122 *
123 *       <jc>// Programmatically contribute a bean to the resource's bean store.</jc>
124 *       <ja>@Bean</ja>
125 *       <jk>public</jk> CallLogger callLogger() {
126 *          <jk>return new</jk> MyCustomCallLogger();
127 *       }
128 *    }
129 * </p>
130 *
131 * <p>
132 * The historical <c>public MyResource(RestContext.Builder builder)</c> constructor-injection pattern and the
133 * <c>{@link RestInit @RestInit} public void init(RestContext.Builder builder)</c> method-injection pattern were both
134 * removed in 10.0. {@code RestContext.Builder} itself is on the deletion path; new code should not depend on it.
135 * See <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/V10.0MigrationGuide">v10.0 Migration Guide</a>
136 * for replacement recipes.
137 *
138 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
139 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
140 * </ul>
141 *
142 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
143 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestContext">RestContext</a>
144 * </ul>
145 */
146@SuppressWarnings({
147   "java:S112",  // RuntimeException used in memoizer lambdas to re-wrap checked exceptions (ServletException/Exception) that Supplier<T> cannot declare
148   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_allowContentParam)
149   "java:S1200", // Class has many dependencies; acceptable for this core context class
150   "java:S1192", // Duplicate string literals are property key names and REST annotation attribute values; intentional
151   "java:S125",  // Explanatory comments reference SVL ($C{...}/$E{...}) and annotation (@Bean/@Rest) tokens that Sonar misreads as commented-out code
152   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity in field-initializer lambdas (memoizer wiring); cannot annotate at lambda scope
153   "java:S6539", // Monster class; RestContext is intentionally a central hub for REST framework configuration
154   "resource"    // Streams and session objects returned to callers; lifecycle managed by the servlet container or RestCall
155})
156public class RestContext extends Context {
157
158   private static final Logger LOG = Logger.getLogger(RestContext.class);
159
160   // Property name constants
161   private static final String PROP_allowContentParam = "allowContentParam";
162   private static final String PROP_beanStore = "beanStore";
163   private static final String PROP_consumes = "consumes";
164   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestAttributes = "defaultRequestAttributes";
165   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestHeaders = "defaultRequestHeaders";
166   private static final String PROP_defaultResponseHeaders = "defaultResponseHeaders";
167   private static final String PROP_partParser = "partParser";
168   private static final String PROP_partSerializer = "partSerializer";
169   private static final String PROP_produces = "produces";
170   private static final String PROP_responseProcessors = "responseProcessors";
171   private static final String PROP_restOpArgs = "restOpArgs";
172   private static final String PROP_bootstrapVarResolver = "bootstrapVarResolver";
173   private static final String PROP_staticFiles = "staticFiles";
174   private static final String PROP_swaggerProvider = "swaggerProvider";
175   private static final String PROP_openApiProvider = "openApiProvider";
176
177   /**
178    * Bootstrap arguments for {@link RestContext}.
179    *
180    * <p>
181    * Bundles the small, fixed set of inputs needed to construct a {@link RestContext} into a single immutable record.
182    *
183    * <p>
184    * All non-required values default sensibly:
185    * <ul>
186    *    <li>{@code parentContext}, {@code servletConfig} — {@code null} (top-level resource, no servlet container)
187    *    <li>{@code path} — {@code ""} (no path prefix)
188    *    <li>{@code beanStoreConfigurer} — no-op (no pre-build bean-store mutation)
189    *    <li>{@code overridingParent} — {@code null} (no test-time override layer)
190    * </ul>
191    *
192    * <p>
193    * The {@code beanStoreConfigurer} hook gives test fixtures and integration code a chance to register beans on
194    * the {@link WritableBeanStore} after the resource has been wired in but before the
195    * {@code findXxx()} memoizers fire.
196    *
197    * <p>
198    * The {@code overridingParent} hook installs a {@link BeanStore} into the {@code overridingParent} slot of the
199    * freshly-constructed {@link BasicBeanStore} so that test-time overrides resolve at tier 1 of the lookup chain
200    * (above the resource's local {@code @Bean} factory entries and the Spring bridge).  This is the
201    * canonical Mode INJECT wiring point for {@code juneau-junit5}'s {@code TestBeanStore}.
202    *
203    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
204    * <p class='bjava'>
205    *    <jk>var</jk> <jv>ctx</jv> = <jk>new</jk> RestContext(<jk>new</jk> RestContext.Args(MyResource.<jk>class</jk>, () -&gt; <jk>new</jk> MyResource()));
206    * </p>
207    *
208    * @param resourceClass The {@link Rest @Rest}-annotated REST resource class. Must not be {@code null}.
209    * @param parentContext The parent {@link RestContext}, or {@code null} if this is a top-level resource.
210    * @param servletConfig The {@link ServletConfig} from the servlet container, or {@code null} when none is available.
211    * @param resource The supplier that provides the resource instance during initialization. Must not be {@code null}.
212    * @param path The path prefix relative to the parent. Defaults to {@code ""}.
213    * @param beanStoreConfigurer A pre-build hook that runs against the resolved {@link WritableBeanStore}
214    *    after the resource has been wired in but before any {@code findXxx()} memoizer fires. Defaults to a no-op.
215    * @param overridingParent An optional test-time override layer installed into the {@code overridingParent}
216    *    slot of the freshly-constructed {@link BasicBeanStore}.  May be {@code null}.  Honored only when the
217    *    resource does <i>not</i> declare an {@code @Bean WritableBeanStore} factory method; user-supplied bean
218    *    stores are passed through unchanged.
219    * @param paths An optional programmatic override for the top-level mount-paths array (the highest-priority
220    *    rung in the runtime-override chain documented on {@link RestContext#getPaths()}).  {@code null} (the
221    *    default) means &quot;no programmatic override&quot; &mdash; resolution falls through to the resource's
222    *    {@code getPaths()} getter, then {@link Rest#paths()} (SVL-resolved per element and comma-split).
223    *    An empty array explicitly clears the mount list (no top-level mounts).
224    * @param kind The build-time {@link ContextKind kind} of this context — {@link ContextKind#ROOT ROOT} for a
225    *    top-level/host/mock resource, {@link ContextKind#CHILD CHILD} for a {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)}
226    *    sub-resource (isolated resolution), or a {@link ContextKind.Mixin MIXIN} carrying the {@link ResolvedMixin}
227    *    that produced a per-mixin sub-context (parent-linked to the host so that
228    *    {@link RestContext#getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String) annotation-property walks} prepend the host's
229    *    {@code @Rest} chain before the mixin's own).
230    *
231    * @since 10.0.0
232    */
233   @SuppressWarnings({
234      "java:S6218" // Args is a transient constructor-parameter holder; it is never compared for equality or used as a map key, so array-identity semantics on the paths[] component are irrelevant.
235   })
236   public static record Args(
237      Class<?> resourceClass,
238      RestContext parentContext,
239      ServletConfig servletConfig,
240      Supplier<?> resource,
241      String path,
242      Consumer<WritableBeanStore> beanStoreConfigurer,
243      BeanStore overridingParent,
244      String[] paths,
245      ContextKind kind,
246      RestBuilder<?> restBuilder
247   ) {
248
249      /**
250       * Compact canonical constructor — null-coalesces optional fields and validates required ones.
251       */
252      public Args {
253         assertArgNotNull("resourceClass", resourceClass);
254         assertArgNotNull("resource", resource);
255         if (path == null)
256            path = "";
257         if (beanStoreConfigurer == null)
258            beanStoreConfigurer = bs -> {};
259         if (kind == null)
260            kind = ContextKind.ROOT;
261      }
262
263      /**
264       * Back-compatible constructor without the {@code restBuilder} component (defaults it to <jk>null</jk>).
265       *
266       * <p>
267       * The {@code restBuilder} is then resolved during {@link RestContext} construction from the
268       * resource instance's stashed builder, so call sites that don't carry one keep working unchanged.
269       *
270       * @param resourceClass The resource class.
271       * @param parentContext The parent context, or <jk>null</jk>.
272       * @param servletConfig The servlet config, or <jk>null</jk>.
273       * @param resource The resource supplier.
274       * @param path The mount path override, or <jk>null</jk>.
275       * @param beanStoreConfigurer The bean-store configurer, or <jk>null</jk>.
276       * @param overridingParent The overriding parent bean store, or <jk>null</jk>.
277       * @param paths The programmatic mount-paths override, or <jk>null</jk>.
278       * @param kind The build-time {@link ContextKind kind} of this context, or <jk>null</jk> for {@link ContextKind#ROOT}.
279       */
280      public Args(Class<?> resourceClass, RestContext parentContext, ServletConfig servletConfig, Supplier<?> resource, String path, Consumer<WritableBeanStore> beanStoreConfigurer, BeanStore overridingParent, String[] paths, ContextKind kind) {
281         this(resourceClass, parentContext, servletConfig, resource, path, beanStoreConfigurer, overridingParent, paths, kind, null);
282      }
283
284      /**
285       * Returns {@code true} when this context is a per-mixin sub-context (its {@link #kind()} is a
286       * {@link ContextKind.Mixin}).
287       *
288       * @return {@code true} for a mixin sub-context.
289       */
290      public boolean isMixinContext() {
291         return kind instanceof ContextKind.Mixin;
292      }
293   }
294
295   /**
296    * The discovery-time normalized declaration of a single mixin.
297    *
298    * <p>
299    * Every mixin entry &mdash; whether a bare {@link Rest#mixins() Class&lt;?&gt;} or a rich
300    * {@link Rest#mixinDefs() &#64;Mixin} &mdash; is normalized to one of these immutable carriers at discovery
301    * time, so all downstream code consumes a single shape with no bare-vs-def branching.  A bare class is
302    * normalized to {@code new ResolvedMixin(type, MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT)} (i.e. {@code @Mixin(type=X)} with
303    * empty overrides), so a bare class and an empty-override {@code @Mixin} are structurally identical.
304    *
305    * <p>
306    * The {@code overrides} annotation is the single home for the host-declared override payload (guards,
307    * serializers, default headers, {@code path}/{@code paths}, {@code noInherit}, &hellip;).  For bare classes
308    * it is {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT} (all slots empty), which contributes nothing &mdash; so bare-class
309    * mixins behave exactly as they did before the {@code @Mixin} feature.
310    *
311    * @param type The mixin class.
312    * @param overrides The host-declared override annotation, or {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT} for a bare class.
313    *
314    * @since 10.0.0
315    */
316   public static record ResolvedMixin(Class<?> type, Mixin overrides) {
317
318      /**
319       * Compact canonical constructor — validates required components and null-coalesces {@code overrides}.
320       */
321      public ResolvedMixin {
322         assertArgNotNull("type", type);
323         if (overrides == null)
324            overrides = MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT;
325      }
326
327      /**
328       * Normalizes a bare mixin class to a {@link ResolvedMixin} with no overrides.
329       *
330       * @param type The mixin class.
331       * @return A {@link ResolvedMixin} carrying {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT} overrides.
332       */
333      static ResolvedMixin ofBare(Class<?> type) {
334         return new ResolvedMixin(type, MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT);
335      }
336
337      /**
338       * Normalizes a rich {@code @Mixin} declaration to a {@link ResolvedMixin}.
339       *
340       * @param m The {@code @Mixin} annotation.
341       * @return A {@link ResolvedMixin} carrying {@code m} as its override payload.
342       */
343      static ResolvedMixin ofDef(Mixin m) {
344         return new ResolvedMixin(m.type(), m);
345      }
346
347      /**
348       * Returns {@code true} when this mixin carries no host-declared overrides (i.e. is equivalent to a bare class).
349       *
350       * @return {@code true} if the override payload is {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT}.
351       */
352      boolean hasNoOverrides() {
353         return overrides == MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT;
354      }
355   }
356
357   /**
358    * The build-time <i>kind</i> of a {@link RestContext} — which of the three construction flavors produced it.
359    *
360    * <p>
361    * Replaces the former boolean {@code mixinContext} flag on {@link Args} with a typed discriminator so the
362    * three flavors are explicit and self-documenting at every call site, and so the {@code MIXIN} flavor can
363    * carry the {@link ResolvedMixin} that produced it (the single home for the host-declared override payload,
364    * consumed at build time when the mixin sub-context resolves its settings).
365    *
366    * <p>
367    * <b>Mixin vs. child asymmetry (important — do not assume symmetry):</b> a {@link Mixin} sub-context is
368    * parent-linked to the host and <i>inherits</i> the host's {@code @Rest} annotation chain
369    * ({@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} walks host&rarr;mixin), so {@code @Mixin} overrides
370    * <i>layer on top of</i> an inherited chain.  A {@link Child} is <i>isolated</i> ({@link #HOST_ONLY_PROPERTIES}
371    * includes {@code children}; children retain pre-10.0.0 isolated resolution with no parent walk).  So a future
372    * {@code @Child} would <i>seed</i> settings onto an isolated context rather than <i>override</i> an inherited
373    * chain, and would have no {@code noInherit} analog — it must NOT reuse the mixin override-resolution path.
374    * The {@code Child} variant is intentionally shaped so it can later widen to reference a {@code ResolvedChild}
375    * (mirroring how {@code Mixin} references a {@code ResolvedMixin}) without re-plumbing this discriminator.
376    * See {@code MAYBE-182} for the parked {@code @Child} design.
377    *
378    * @since 10.0.0
379    */
380   public sealed interface ContextKind permits ContextKind.Root, ContextKind.Child, ContextKind.Mixin {
381
382      /** A top-level (host) resource, mock context, or servlet-mounted resource. */
383      record Root() implements ContextKind {}
384
385      /** A routed child resource (mounted via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)}); isolated resolution. */
386      record Child() implements ContextKind {}
387
388      /**
389       * A per-mixin sub-context (composed via {@link Rest#mixins()}/{@link Rest#mixinDefs()}); inherits the host chain.
390       *
391       * @param def The normalized declaration that produced this sub-context — carries the host-declared override payload.
392       */
393      record Mixin(ResolvedMixin def) implements ContextKind {}
394
395      /** Shared {@link Root} singleton (the common case). */
396      ContextKind ROOT = new Root();
397
398      /** Shared {@link Child} singleton (the path override travels in {@link Args#path()}, not here). */
399      ContextKind CHILD = new Child();
400   }
401
402   /**
403    * Builder class.
404    *
405    * <p>
406    * Demoted to package-private in the April 2026 refactor (2026-04-19). User code should construct a
407    * {@link RestContext} via the public {@link #RestContext(Args)} constructor; this Builder
408    * exists only as internal bootstrap state for the framework and is slated for inlining in a later phase.
409    */
410   @SuppressWarnings({
411      "rawtypes" // Raw types required: annotation type parameter is unknown at static analysis time.
412   })
413   static class Builder extends Context.Builder implements ServletConfig {
414
415      private final Class<?> resourceClass;
416      private final RestContext parentContext;
417      private final ServletConfig inner;
418      final Args args;
419
420      /**
421       * Programmatic top-level mount-paths override.
422       *
423       * <p>
424       * Highest-priority rung in the runtime-override chain documented on {@link RestContext#getPaths()}.
425       * Set via {@link #paths(String...)}.
426       *
427       * <ul>
428       *    <li>{@code null} (default) &mdash; no programmatic override; falls through to the resource's
429       *       {@code getPaths()} getter, then the {@code @Rest(paths=...)} annotation default (SVL-resolved
430       *       per element and comma-split).
431       *    <li>Empty array &mdash; explicit clear; resource is resolved with no top-level mounts.
432       *    <li>Non-empty array &mdash; replaces all lower rungs.
433       * </ul>
434       */
435      String[] paths;
436
437      /**
438       * Programmatic override for the MDC async propagation flag.
439       *
440       * <p>
441       * {@code null} (default) &mdash; defers to the {@code RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation} env-driven
442       * default (itself defaulting to {@code true} when SLF4J is detected). Set via
443       * {@link #mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean)}.
444       */
445      Boolean mdcAsyncPropagation;
446
447      /**
448       * Programmatic override for the async-completion executor bean name.
449       *
450       * <p>
451       * {@code null} (default) &mdash; resolved from the {@code @Rest(asyncCompletionExecutor)} annotation chain.
452       * Set via {@link #asyncCompletionExecutor(String)} to supply the bean-name programmatically (useful in
453       * test rigs that construct a {@link RestContext} directly without annotations).
454       */
455      String asyncCompletionExecutorName;
456
457      /**
458       * Programmatic override for the lazy-children flag.
459       *
460       * <p>
461       * {@code null} (default) &mdash; defers to the {@link Rest#lazyChildren() @Rest(lazyChildren)} annotation
462       * chain, then to the {@code RestContext.lazyChildren} env-driven default (itself defaulting to
463       * {@code false}). Set via {@link #lazyChildInit(boolean)}.
464       *
465       * <p>
466       * When {@code true}, all children registered via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)} on this resource
467       * are built lazily on first invocation rather than eagerly at parent startup.
468       */
469      Boolean lazyChildInit;
470
471      /**
472       * Package-private constructor.
473       *
474       * <p>
475       * Minimized in the May 2026 refactor — the beanStore setup, {@code @Bean} processing,
476       * {@code @RestInit} hooks, and {@code beanStoreConfigurer} call were all moved into
477       * {@link RestContext#RestContext(Builder)}. The Builder now only stores the three fields
478       * that are final and needed by the {@link ServletConfig} overrides and factory methods.
479       *
480       * @param rci The bootstrap arguments. Must not be {@code null}.
481       */
482      Builder(Args rci) {
483         this.resourceClass = rci.resourceClass();
484         this.inner = rci.servletConfig();
485         this.parentContext = rci.parentContext();
486         this.args = rci;
487         this.paths = rci.paths();
488      }
489
490      /**
491       * Programmatic override for the top-level mount-paths array.
492       *
493       * <p>
494       * This is the highest-priority rung in the runtime-override chain &mdash; see
495       * {@link RestContext#getPaths()} for the full precedence order.
496       *
497       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
498       *    <li class='note'>
499       *       Passing {@code null} resets the override and lets the lower rungs ({@code getPaths()} getter,
500       *       {@code @Rest(paths)} annotation) resolve.
501       *    <li class='note'>
502       *       Passing {@code new String[0]} explicitly clears the mount list &mdash; the resource ends up with
503       *       no top-level mounts, which surfaces a clear &quot;no mounts&quot; error from the hosting runtime.
504       * </ul>
505       *
506       * @param value The new mount paths, or {@code null} to inherit. Empty array clears.
507       * @return This object.
508       * @since 10.0.0
509       */
510      public Builder paths(String...value) {
511         paths = value;
512         return this;
513      }
514
515      /**
516       * Enables or disables SLF4J MDC propagation from the request thread to
517       * {@link CompletableFuture} completion threads.
518       *
519       * <p>
520       * Default is {@code true} (enabled) when SLF4J is on the runtime classpath.
521       * When enabled, the {@link MdcAsyncListener} snapshots the
522       * request thread's MDC map before the async dispatch and restores it inside the
523       * {@link CompletionStage#whenComplete(BiConsumer) whenComplete}
524       * callback so that log statements emitted during async completion see the original request context.
525       *
526       * <p>
527       * Call {@code mdcAsyncPropagation(false)} to opt a resource out of MDC propagation. The global default
528       * can also be overridden via the {@code RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation} env-driven default.
529       *
530       * @param value {@code false} to disable MDC propagation on this resource.
531       * @return This object.
532       * @since 10.0.0
533       */
534      public Builder mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean value) {
535         mdcAsyncPropagation = value;
536         return this;
537      }
538
539      /**
540       * Programmatically sets the {@link Executor} bean name used to route
541       * {@link CompletableFuture} completion callbacks through a dedicated thread pool
542       * Equivalent to {@link Rest#asyncCompletionExecutor()} on the resource class.
543       *
544       * <p>
545       * The value is looked up by name in the resource's bean store at context-build time. If the name does
546       * not resolve to an {@link Executor} bean, the context constructor throws. Pass
547       * {@code null} (or omit this call) to clear the override and fall back to the annotation chain.
548       *
549       * @param beanName The bean-store name of the {@link Executor} to use, or {@code null} to clear.
550       * @return This object.
551       * @since 10.0.0
552       */
553      public Builder asyncCompletionExecutor(String beanName) {
554         asyncCompletionExecutorName = beanName;
555         return this;
556      }
557
558      /**
559       * Programmatically opt this resource into (or out of) deferred child construction.
560       *
561       * <p>
562       * When {@code true}, all children registered via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)} are built
563       * lazily on first invocation instead of eagerly at parent startup.  The routing entry for each child
564       * is always populated at startup so URL matching works immediately.
565       *
566       * <p>
567       * This is the highest-priority knob — it overrides both the
568       * {@link Rest#lazyChildren() @Rest(lazyChildren)} annotation and the
569       * {@code RestContext.lazyChildren} env-driven default.
570       *
571       * @param value {@code true} to defer child construction to first invocation.
572       * @return This object.
573       * @since 10.0.0
574       */
575      public Builder lazyChildInit(boolean value) {
576         lazyChildInit = value;
577         return this;
578      }
579
580      @Override /* Context.Builder<?> is abstract - copy() is not meaningful for the transient RestContext bootstrap state. */
581      public Builder copy() {
582         throw new NoSuchMethodError("Not implemented.");
583      }
584
585      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
586      public String getInitParameter(String name) {
587         return inner == null ? null : inner.getInitParameter(name);
588      }
589
590      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
591      public Enumeration<String> getInitParameterNames() { return o(inner).map(ServletConfig::getInitParameterNames).orElseGet(() -> new Vector<String>().elements()); }
592
593      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
594      public ServletContext getServletContext() {
595         if (nn(inner)) {
596            return inner.getServletContext();
597         } else if (nn(parentContext)) {
598            return parentContext.getBuilder().getServletContext();
599         } else {
600            return null;
601         }
602      }
603
604      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
605      public String getServletName() { return o(inner).map(ServletConfig::getServletName).orElse(null); }
606
607   }
608
609   private static final Map<Class<?>,RestContext> REGISTRY = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
610
611   /**
612    * Returns a registry of all created {@link RestContext} objects.
613    *
614    * @return An unmodifiable map of resource classes to {@link RestContext} objects.
615    */
616   public static final Map<Class<?>,RestContext> getGlobalRegistry() { return u(REGISTRY); }
617
618   static ServletException servletException(String msg, Object...args) {
619      return new ServletException(f(msg, args));
620   }
621
622   static ServletException servletException(Throwable t, String msg, Object...args) {
623      return new ServletException(f(msg, args), t);
624   }
625
626   private static <T extends Annotation> Stream<Method> getAnnotatedMethods(Supplier<?> resource, Class<T> annotation) {
627      return ClassInfo.ofProxy(resource.get()).getAllMethodsTopDown().stream()
628         .filter(y -> y.hasAnnotation(annotation))
629         .filter(distinctByKey(MethodInfo::getSignature))
630         .map(y -> y.accessible().inner());
631   }
632
633   /**
634    * Resolves the top-level mount paths for a resource using the runtime-override chain.
635    *
636    * <p>
637    * Walks the three rungs in precedence order (highest first):
638    * <ol>
639    *    <li>Programmatic override on {@link Builder#paths} (set by {@link Builder#paths(String...)} or seeded from
640    *       {@link Args#paths()}).
641    *    <li>The resource's {@code getPaths()} getter (when non-{@code null}).
642    *    <li>{@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} annotation default, walked top-down with the most-derived non-empty
643    *       array winning.  Each element is SVL-resolved against a session of {@code vr} backed by
644    *       {@code beanStore} (so {@code $C{key}} consults whatever {@link Config} is registered), then
645    *       comma-split.
646    * </ol>
647    *
648    * @return The resolved paths array (never {@code null}; possibly empty).
649    */
650   private static String[] resolveMountPaths(Builder builder, Object resource, VarResolver vr, WritableBeanStore beanStore, List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>> annotations) {
651      // Rung 1: programmatic override (Builder.paths / Args.paths).
652      var programmatic = builder.paths;
653      if (programmatic != null)
654         return programmatic.clone();
655      return resolvePathsCore(annotations, resource, vr, beanStore);
656   }
657
658   /**
659    * Public mount-time path resolver for use by hosting runtimes that mount {@code @Rest}-annotated resources
660    * before the {@link RestContext} has been constructed (e.g. {@code JettyServerComponent}'s auto-discovery
661    * loop, or Spring Boot's {@code ServletRegistrationBean} wiring).
662    *
663    * <p>
664    * Operates on the same chain as {@link RestContext#getPaths()} but skips the programmatic Builder rung
665    * (which is only meaningful inside the {@link RestContext} constructor):
666    * <ol>
667    *    <li>The resource's {@code getPaths()} virtual getter (defined on {@code RestServlet} /
668    *       {@code RestResource}). {@code null} return falls through; non-{@code null} (including empty array) wins.
669    *    <li>{@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} annotation default on the most-derived class, SVL-resolved per
670    *       element and comma-split.  A {@code VarResolver} is looked up on {@code store} (when present); SVL
671    *       variables like {@code $C{key}} resolve against beans visible to the bean store.
672    * </ol>
673    *
674    * @param resourceClass The {@code @Rest}-annotated resource class. Must not be {@code null}.
675    * @param resource The resource instance. May be {@code null} (in which case the getter rung is skipped).
676    * @param store The bean store used to look up the {@link VarResolver} for SVL substitution on annotation
677    *    elements, and to back the resolver session for bean-driven SVL vars like {@code $C{key}}. May be
678    *    {@code null} (SVL is then skipped; literals pass through unchanged).
679    * @return The resolved paths array (never {@code null}; possibly empty).
680    * @since 10.0.0
681    */
682   public static String[] resolveTopLevelPaths(Class<?> resourceClass, Object resource, BeanStore store) {
683      var ap = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
684      var ci = ClassInfo.of(resourceClass);
685      var annotations = rstream(ap.find(Rest.class, ci)).toList();
686      var vr = (store == null) ? null : store.getBean(VarResolver.class).orElse(null);
687      // Cast for the bean-store-backed resolver session only — when store is a plain BeanStore (not
688      // WritableBeanStore) we skip the session form and call vr.resolve(...) directly.
689      var ws = (store instanceof WritableBeanStore wbs) ? wbs : null;
690      return resolvePathsCore(annotations, resource, vr, ws);
691   }
692
693   private static String[] resolvePathsCore(List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>> annotations, Object resource, VarResolver vr, WritableBeanStore beanStore) {
694      // Rung 2: getPaths() virtual getter on the resource (RestServlet / RestResource / any matching class).
695      // The getter return is normalized to a flat List<String> of raw leaves (any String / String[] /
696      // Collection / Iterable / Stream / nested mix of those), then each leaf flows through the same
697      // SVL-resolve + comma-split pipeline used for @Rest(paths=...) annotation elements.
698      var raw = invokeGetPaths(resource);
699      if (raw != null) {
700         var leaves = normalizePaths(raw);
701         return expandPathsElements(leaves.toArray(new String[0]), vr, beanStore);
702      }
703
704      // Rung 3: @Rest(paths) annotation default — most-derived non-empty array wins, with each element
705      // SVL-resolved then comma-split (trim each piece, drop empties).  A single template element can
706      // therefore expand to zero, one, or many mount paths.  Annotation arrays from javac are never
707      // null, so the only filter needed is the empty-array case.
708      return annotations.stream()
709         .map(ai -> ai.inner().paths())
710         .filter(arr -> arr.length > 0)
711         .findFirst()
712         .map(arr -> expandPathsElements(arr, vr, beanStore))
713         .orElseGet(() -> new String[0]);
714   }
715
716   /**
717    * Applies the per-element SVL + comma-split pipeline to a {@code @Rest(paths=...)} array.
718    *
719    * <p>
720    * Each input element is SVL-resolved (via a session of the bootstrap {@link VarResolver} that's backed
721    * by {@code beanStore} when one is available, so bean-driven vars like {@code $C{key}} can find the
722    * registered {@link Config}), then split on {@code ,}; each piece is trimmed and empty pieces are
723    * dropped.  This lets a single element like {@code "$C{health.paths}"} or
724    * {@code "$E{HEALTH_PATHS,/healthz,/readyz}"} expand to multiple mount paths.
725    */
726   private static String[] expandPathsElements(String[] elements, VarResolver vr, WritableBeanStore beanStore) {
727      // Open a single session for the whole array — reusing it across elements avoids re-walking the
728      // Var catalog and lets ConfigVar / FileVar / etc. all share one bean-lookup context.
729      var session = (vr == null) ? null : vr.createSession(beanStore);
730      var out = new ArrayList<String>(elements.length);
731      for (var e : elements) {
732         var resolved = applySvl(e, session);
733         splitPathsValue(resolved, out);
734      }
735      return out.toArray(new String[0]);
736   }
737
738   private static String applySvl(String value, VarResolverSession session) {
739      // Callers only pass annotation-array elements, which javac guarantees non-null.  An empty string
740      // has no SVL markers to resolve, so we short-circuit it (avoids a pointless session.resolve call).
741      if (session == null || value.isEmpty())
742         return value;
743      try {
744         return session.resolve(value);
745      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) {
746         return value; // SVL failure: prefer the literal over throwing during construction.
747      }
748   }
749
750   private static void splitPathsValue(String value, List<String> out) {
751      // Callers pass the return of applySvl, which never returns null (we control both branches above).
752      if (value.isBlank())
753         return;
754      var parts = value.split(",");
755      for (var p : parts) {
756         var t = p.trim();
757         if (! t.isEmpty())
758            out.add(t);
759      }
760   }
761
762   /**
763    * Flattens any {@link Object} returned from {@code getPaths()} (String, {@code String[]},
764    * {@link Collection}, {@link Iterable}, {@link Stream}, primitive array, or nested mixes of these)
765    * into a flat {@link List} of raw leaf strings.
766    *
767    * <p>
768    * Non-{@link String} leaves are coerced via {@link String#valueOf(Object)}.  The returned list
769    * preserves traversal order; {@code null} leaves are dropped.  Comma-split + SVL resolution are
770    * intentionally <i>not</i> applied here &mdash; they happen downstream in
771    * {@link #expandPathsElements(String[], VarResolver, WritableBeanStore)} so SVL substitution sees the
772    * raw element (preserving {@code $E{NAME,defaultWithCommas}}-style defaults) before the post-SVL
773    * comma-split fires.
774    */
775   private static List<String> normalizePaths(Object o) {
776      if (o == null)
777         return List.of();
778      var out = new ArrayList<String>();
779      CollectionUtils.<Object>accumulate(o).forEach(x -> {
780         if (x != null)
781            out.add(String.valueOf(x));
782      });
783      return out;
784   }
785
786   /**
787    * Reflectively invokes a no-arg {@code getPaths()} method on the resource (defined on
788    * {@link RestServlet RestServlet} and
789    * {@link RestResource RestResource}). Reflection is used to avoid coupling this
790    * static utility to either base class &mdash; if a custom {@code @Rest}-annotated POJO declares
791    * {@code public Object getPaths()} (or any covariant return type such as {@code String[]},
792    * {@code List<String>}, etc.), it participates uniformly.
793    *
794    * @return The raw getter return value, or {@code null} when no method exists, the method returns
795    *    {@code void}, the method returned {@code null}, or reflective invocation failed.
796    */
797   private static Object invokeGetPaths(Object resource) {
798      if (resource == null)
799         return null;
800      Method m;
801      try {
802         m = resource.getClass().getMethod("getPaths");
803      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NoSuchMethodException e) {
804         return null;
805      }
806      if (m.getReturnType() == void.class)
807         return null;
808      try {
809         return m.invoke(resource);
810      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") IllegalAccessException | InvocationTargetException e) {
811         return null;
812      }
813   }
814
815   private static boolean isBeanMethod(MethodInfo mi) {
816      return isBeanMethod(mi, null);
817   }
818
819   private static boolean isBeanMethod(MethodInfo mi, String name) {
820      return mi.getAnnotations(Bean.class)
821         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
822         .anyMatch(x -> nn(x) && x.methodScope().length == 0 && (n(name) || eq(x.name(), name)));
823   }
824
825   protected final AtomicBoolean initialized = new AtomicBoolean(false);
826   protected final BasicHttpException initException;
827   protected final WritableBeanStore beanStore;
828   protected final WritableBeanStore bootstrapBeanStore;  // Writable during bootstrap; exposed for child-context composition.
829   protected final Builder builder;
830   protected final Class<?> resourceClass;
831   protected final ConcurrentHashMap<Locale,Swagger> swaggerCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
832   protected final ConcurrentHashMap<Locale,OpenApi> openApiCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
833   protected final Instant startTime;
834   protected final RestContext parentContext;
835   protected final boolean isMixinContext;
836   /** The build-time kind of this context (never {@code null}). */
837   protected final ContextKind contextKind;
838   /** The normalized mixin declaration that produced this sub-context, or {@code null} when not a mixin context. */
839   protected final ResolvedMixin resolvedMixin;
840   protected final String fullPath;
841   protected final String path;
842   protected final String[] paths;
843   protected final ThreadLocal<RestSession> localSession = new ThreadLocal<>();
844   protected final UrlPathMatcher pathMatcher;
845   private final Supplier<?> resource;
846   private AnnotationWorkList annotationWork;
847
848   /**
849    * The programmatic configuration builder for this resource, or <jk>null</jk> when configured purely
850    * by annotation.  Resolved during construction from {@link Args#restBuilder()} or, failing that, from the
851    * resource instance's stashed builder.  When non-<jk>null</jk>, a synthetic highest-priority {@code @Rest}
852    * annotation built from its set members is prepended to {@link #getRestAnnotations()} so builder-supplied
853    * values take precedence over the resource class's own {@code @Rest} annotation values.
854    */
855   private final RestBuilder<?> restBuilder;
856
857   /**
858    * The synthetic {@code @Rest} annotation built from {@link #restBuilder}'s set members, or <jk>null</jk> when
859    * there is no programmatic builder.  Prepended at the most-derived (child) position of
860    * {@link #getRestAnnotations()} so builder-supplied values win over the resource class's own annotation.
861    */
862   private final Rest builderRestAnnotation;
863
864   // Private accessors used by memoizer lambdas to satisfy Java's definite-assignment rules for blank final fields.
865   private WritableBeanStore beanStore() { return beanStore; }
866   private Supplier<?> resource() { return resource; }
867   private Class<?> resourceClass() { return resourceClass; }
868   private boolean isMixinContextField() { return isMixinContext; }
869
870   /**
871    * Field accessor for {@link #resolvedMixin}, callable from memoizer field-initializer lambdas (which run
872    * before the blank-final field is read directly).  Returns the normalized mixin declaration that produced
873    * this sub-context, or {@code null} when this is not a mixin context.
874    *
875    * @return The resolved mixin, or {@code null}.
876    */
877   private ResolvedMixin resolvedMixinField() { return resolvedMixin; }
878
879   /**
880    * Creates the bean store for this context.
881    *
882    * <p>
883    * The 10.0 precedence model places the parent (Spring or parent-resource bootstrap) as the
884    * overriding parent so it wins over local entries.  Memoizer-backed framework defaults are
885    * registered later in the constructor via {@code addDefaultSupplier}, putting them at the
886    * bottom of the resolution order.
887    *
888    * <p>
889    * Resolution:
890    * <ol>
891    *    <li>If the resource declares an {@code @Bean} factory method returning a
892    *       {@link WritableBeanStore} (e.g. {@code SpringRestServlet.createBeanStore(Optional<BeanStore>)}),
893    *       that store is used directly.  Spring integration relies on this hook.
894    *    <li>Otherwise a fresh {@link BasicBeanStore} is created with {@code parentBs} as its
895    *       regular parent and {@code overridingParent} (if non-{@code null}) installed in the
896    *       overriding-parent slot so test-time overrides win over local entries.
897    * </ol>
898    *
899    * @param parentBs
900    *    The parent (bootstrap) bean store to layer onto, or {@code null} for root resources.
901    * @param resource
902    *    The REST servlet/bean instance that this context is defined against.
903    * @param overridingParent
904    *    Optional test-time override layer for the {@code overridingParent} slot of the freshly-constructed
905    *    {@link BasicBeanStore}.  May be {@code null}.  Ignored when the resource supplies its own
906    *    {@link WritableBeanStore} via an {@code @Bean} factory method &mdash; user-supplied stores are
907    *    passed through unchanged.
908    * @return The bean store for this context.
909    */
910   private WritableBeanStore createBeanStore(BeanStore parentBs, Supplier<?> resource, BeanStore overridingParent) {
911      var defaultBs = new BasicBeanStore(parentBs, overridingParent);
912      return defaultBs.createBeanFromMethod(WritableBeanStore.class, resource.get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod)
913         .orElse(defaultBs);
914   }
915   private RestContext parentContext() { return parentContext; }
916   private RestOperations restOperations() { return restOperations.get(); }
917
918   /**
919    * Returns {@code true} when this context is a per-mixin sub-context constructed by the host's
920    * {@code restOperations} memoizer.
921    *
922    * <p>
923    * A mixin sub-context is parent-linked to the host's {@link RestContext} so that
924    * {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String) annotation-property walks} prepend the host's {@code @Rest}
925    * chain before the mixin's own &mdash; serializers, parsers, encoders, converters, response processors,
926    * REST op args, guards, callLogger, debugEnablement, messages, and varResolver tokens all inherit from the
927    * host first, with the mixin's contributions appended.  Use {@link Rest#noInherit() @Rest(noInherit)} on the
928    * mixin class to cut off inheritance for any specific property.
929    *
930    * <p>
931    * {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)} sub-resources are <i>not</i> mixin contexts &mdash; they retain
932    * pre-10.0.0 isolated resolution (no parent-context walk).  The mixin-vs-child divergence is intentional:
933    * mixins are inline composers that share the host's URL namespace; children are heavyweight independent
934    * resources mounted at their own URL prefix.
935    *
936    * @return {@code true} if this is a mixin sub-context, {@code false} for top-level resources and child
937    *    resources.
938    * @since 10.0.0
939    */
940   public boolean isMixinContext() { return isMixinContext; }
941
942   /**
943    * Returns the parent {@link RestContext}, or {@code null} for top-level resources.
944    *
945    * <p>
946    * The parent linkage drives the inheritance walk in {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} for
947    * {@linkplain #isMixinContext() mixin sub-contexts}, and the {@code parentContext} walks performed by
948    * {@link #getMessages()}, {@link #getVarResolver()}, {@code getFullPath()}, and the bean-store layering.
949    *
950    * @return The parent context, or {@code null} for top-level (host) resources.
951    * @since 10.0.0
952    */
953   public RestContext getParentContext() { return parentContext; }
954
955   /**
956    * Registers memoizer-backed default suppliers for every framework-managed bean type on the supplied
957    * bean store.
958    *
959    * <p>
960    * Default suppliers sit at the bottom of the bean-store resolution order: they fire only when no
961    * {@link Bean @Bean} method, no programmatic {@code addBean(...)} call, and no Spring/overriding-parent
962    * binding has been registered for the type.  This is the mechanism that replaces the old
963    * {@code DELAYED_INJECTION} list — by registering the framework's own factories as defaults
964    * <i>before</i> the {@link Bean @Bean} method walk runs, any {@link Bean @Bean} method whose parameters
965    * include framework types can now resolve those parameters lazily through the bean store without
966    * requiring a hand-maintained skip list.
967    */
968   private void registerFrameworkDefaults(WritableBeanStore bs) {
969      // @formatter:off
970      // Unnamed framework types backed by per-resource memoizers.
971      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MarshallingContext.class, marshallingContext::get);
972      bs.addDefaultSupplier(EncoderSet.class, encoders::get);
973      bs.addDefaultSupplier(SerializerSet.class, serializers::get);
974      bs.addDefaultSupplier(ParserSet.class, parsers::get);
975      bs.addDefaultSupplier(Logger.class, logger::get);
976      bs.addDefaultSupplier(java.util.logging.Logger.class, logger::get);
977      bs.addDefaultSupplier(ThrownStore.class, thrownStore::get);
978      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodExecStore.class, methodExecStore::get);
979      bs.addDefaultSupplier(Messages.class, messages::get);
980      bs.addDefaultSupplier(VarResolver.class, varResolver::get);
981      bs.addDefaultSupplier(Config.class, config::get);
982      bs.addDefaultSupplier(ResponseProcessor[].class, responseProcessors::get);
983      bs.addDefaultSupplier(CallLogger.class, callLogger::get);
984      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpPartSerializer.class, partSerializer::get);
985      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpPartParser.class, partParser::get);
986      bs.addDefaultSupplier(JsonSchemaGenerator.class, jsonSchemaGenerator::get);
987      bs.addDefaultSupplier(StaticFiles.class, staticFiles::get);
988      bs.addDefaultSupplier(FileFinder.class, staticFiles::get);
989      bs.addDefaultSupplier(DebugEnablement.class, debugEnablement::get);
990      bs.addDefaultSupplier(DebugConfig.class, debugConfig::get);
991      bs.addDefaultSupplier(SwaggerProvider.class, swaggerProvider::get);
992      bs.addDefaultSupplier(OpenApiProvider.class, openApiProvider::get);
993      bs.addDefaultSupplier(RestOperations.class, restOperations::get);
994      bs.addDefaultSupplier(RestChildren.class, restChildren::get);
995      // Named framework beans (replaces DELAYED_INJECTION_NAMES).
996      bs.addDefaultSupplier(VarResolver.class, this::getBootstrapVarResolver, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver);
997      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpHeaderList.class, defaultRequestHeaders::get, PROP_defaultRequestHeaders);
998      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpHeaderList.class, defaultResponseHeaders::get, PROP_defaultResponseHeaders);
999      bs.addDefaultSupplier(NamedAttributeMap.class, defaultRequestAttributes::get, PROP_defaultRequestAttributes);
1000      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> destroyInvokerPair.get().methods, "destroyMethods");
1001      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> endCallInvokerPair.get().methods, "endCallMethods");
1002      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, postCallMethods::get, "postCallMethods");
1003      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> postInitChildFirstInvokerPair.get().methods, "postInitChildFirstMethods");
1004      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> postInitInvokerPair.get().methods, "postInitMethods");
1005      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, preCallMethods::get, "preCallMethods");
1006      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> startCallInvokerPair.get().methods, "startCallMethods");
1007      // @formatter:on
1008   }
1009
1010   /**
1011    * Registers a {@link PropertySource} bean named {@code "rest.config"} in this resource's
1012    * {@code BeanStore} so that {@code @Value("${cfg-key}")} fields on the resource bean (and on
1013    * request-scoped beans whose {@code BeanStore} parent-walks to this one) resolve against the
1014    * resource's {@code @Rest(config=...)} {@link Config}(s).
1015    *
1016    * <p>
1017    * Lookup order honored by the registered source:
1018    * <ol>
1019    *    <li>The child class's resolved {@link Config} &mdash; sourced from {@link #rawConfig} so that
1020    *       any {@link Bean @Bean Config} factory-method override on the resource bean is preserved.
1021    *    <li>Any additional, distinct {@code @Rest(config=...)} {@code Config}s declared on parent
1022    *       classes (child-to-parent order, dedup'd by resolved file name). Child keys win on
1023    *       collision; parent keys fill the gaps.
1024    * </ol>
1025    *
1026    * <p>
1027    * Critically, this registration lives on the per-resource {@code BeanStore} &mdash; <i>not</i> on
1028    * the process-wide {@code Settings.get()} singleton. The static {@code RestContext} cache in
1029    * {@code MockRestClient} (and any other long-lived cache) is therefore benign: leaked
1030    * {@code RestContext}s carry their {@code PropertySource}s in their own {@code BeanStore}s.
1031    * The global {@code Settings} source list does not grow, and {@code Settings.get(name)}'s
1032    * reverse-order walk stays O(constant).
1033    */
1034   private void registerRestConfigPropertySources() {
1035      var sources = collectRestConfigPropertySources();
1036      if (sources.isEmpty())
1037         return;
1038      final List<PropertySource> chain = List.copyOf(sources);
1039      PropertySource src;
1040      if (chain.size() == 1) {
1041         src = chain.get(0);
1042      } else {
1043         src = name -> {
1044            for (var s : chain) {
1045               var r = s.get(name);
1046               if (r.isPresent())
1047                  return r;
1048            }
1049            return PropertyLookupResult.missing();
1050         };
1051      }
1052      beanStore.addBean(PropertySource.class, src, "rest.config");
1053   }
1054
1055   /**
1056    * Walks the {@code @Rest(config=...)} annotation chain (child-first) and builds a
1057    * {@link ConfigPropertySource} for each distinct, non-empty config attribute.
1058    *
1059    * <p>
1060    * The first (most-derived) slot reuses {@code rawConfig.get()} so that any {@link Bean @Bean}
1061    * {@code Config} factory-method override on the resource bean is preserved &mdash; the rest of
1062    * the framework already sees that exact instance via {@link #getConfig()} and {@code @RestInit}
1063    * parameter resolution. Parent slots load via {@code Config.create().name(...)} since {@code @Bean}
1064    * overrides apply to the most-derived class only.
1065    *
1066    * <p>
1067    * Edge case: a resource with no {@code @Rest(config=...)} annotation but with a {@link Bean @Bean}
1068    * {@code Config} factory method has a non-null {@code rawConfig.get()} and no annotation-driven
1069    * slot. That single {@code rawConfig} is still registered so user-supplied {@code Config}s flow
1070    * through to {@code @Value} resolution.
1071    */
1072   @SuppressWarnings({
1073      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for multi-source REST config property collection
1074      "java:S135"   // Per-annotation continue guards are clearer than restructuring the config-source filter chain.
1075   })
1076   private List<PropertySource> collectRestConfigPropertySources() {
1077      var bs = beanStore();
1078      var vr = bs.getBean(VarResolver.class, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver).orElseGet(this::getBootstrapVarResolver);
1079      var result = new ArrayList<PropertySource>();
1080      var seen = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
1081      // AnnotationProvider returns child-first; iterate in the same order so child wins on collision.
1082      var anns = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(Rest.class, info(resourceClass));
1083      for (var i = 0; i < anns.size(); i++) {
1084         var raw = anns.get(i).inner().config();
1085         if (isEmpty(raw))
1086            continue;
1087         var resolvedName = vr.resolve(raw);
1088         if (isEmpty(resolvedName))
1089            continue;
1090         if (! seen.add(resolvedName))
1091            continue;
1092         Config cfg;
1093         if (result.isEmpty()) {
1094            // Most-derived child slot. rawConfig.get() captures @Bean Config override; reuse it.
1095            cfg = rawConfig.get();
1096         } else if ("SYSTEM_DEFAULT".equals(resolvedName)) {
1097            cfg = Config.getSystemDefault();
1098         } else {
1099            cfg = Config.create().varResolver(vr).name(resolvedName).build();
1100         }
1101         if (cfg != null)
1102            result.add(new ConfigPropertySource(cfg));
1103      }
1104      // Edge case: no @Rest(config=...) annotation produced a slot, but rawConfig.get() is non-null
1105      // (e.g. a @Bean Config factory method without a matching @Rest(config=...) attribute, or the
1106      // SYSTEM_DEFAULT branch fired without an annotation). Still register rawConfig as the sole source.
1107      if (result.isEmpty()) {
1108         var rc = rawConfig.get();
1109         if (rc != null)
1110            result.add(new ConfigPropertySource(rc));
1111      }
1112      return result;
1113   }
1114
1115   private static final class LifecycleInvokerPair {
1116      final MethodList methods;
1117      final MethodInvoker[] invokers;
1118
1119      LifecycleInvokerPair(MethodList methods, MethodInvoker[] invokers) {
1120         this.methods = methods;
1121         this.invokers = invokers;
1122      }
1123   }
1124
1125   /**
1126    * The {@link MarshallingContext} for this resource.
1127    *
1128    * <p>
1129    * Triggered eagerly in the constructor after {@code annotationWork} is set, so that annotation
1130    * work is applied before the builder is used by any other memoizer.
1131    */
1132   private final Memoizer<MarshallingContext.Builder> beanContextBuilder = memoizer(() -> {
1133      var v = Holder.of(MarshallingContext.create());
1134      v.get().apply(annotationWork);
1135      return v.get();
1136   });
1137
1138   /**
1139    * The {@link MarshallingContext} for this resource.
1140    */
1141   private final Memoizer<MarshallingContext> marshallingContext = memoizer(() -> beanContextBuilder.get().build());
1142
1143   /**
1144    * The unresolved (bootstrap-time) {@link Config} for this resource.
1145    *
1146    * <p>
1147    * Resolved by reading {@code @Rest(config)} from the annotation chain against the bootstrap
1148    * {@link VarResolver} (which must already be in the bean store). Triggered eagerly in the constructor
1149    * so the raw config is registered before {@code @RestInit} hooks run.
1150    */
1151   private final Memoizer<Config> rawConfig = memoizer(() -> {
1152      var bs = beanStore();
1153      var v = Holder.<Config>empty();
1154      // Bootstrap VarResolver is registered under PROP_bootstrapVarResolver during construction; the
1155      // unnamed VarResolver slot is reserved for the full runtime resolver default supplier.
1156      var vr = bs.getBean(VarResolver.class, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver).orElseGet(this::getBootstrapVarResolver);
1157      var cfv = Holder.<String>empty();
1158      rstream(AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(Rest.class, info(resourceClass()))).map(x -> x.inner().config()).filter(Shorts::ine).forEach(x -> cfv.set(vr.resolve(x)));
1159      var cf = cfv.orElse("");
1160      if (v.isEmpty() && "SYSTEM_DEFAULT".equals(cf))
1161         v.set(Config.getSystemDefault());
1162      if (v.isEmpty() && cf.isEmpty() && isMixinContextField() && getParentContext() != null)
1163         // Mixin sub-contexts with no own @Rest(config) inherit the host's raw Config, so that $C{...}
1164         // SVL variables embedded in inherited class-level config (e.g. the @HtmlDocConfig theme/header/
1165         // footer declared via $C{REST/...} on BasicRestConfig) resolve against the host's loaded config
1166         // rather than an empty one.  This mirrors the way messages and varResolver tokens already inherit
1167         // from the host for mixin sub-contexts.
1168         v.set(getParentContext().rawConfig.get());
1169      if (v.isEmpty()) {
1170         Config.Builder cb = Config.create().varResolver(vr);
1171         if (!cf.isEmpty())
1172            cb.name(cf);
1173         v.set(cb.build());
1174      }
1175      bs.createBeanFromMethod(Config.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1176      return v.get();
1177   });
1178
1179   /**
1180    * The bootstrap-time {@link VarResolver} — no {@link Messages} or {@link Config} bean available yet.
1181    *
1182    * <p>
1183    * Builds the same {@link Var} catalog as the runtime resolver but without {@link Messages} or {@link Config}
1184    * beans wired in — those depend on settings that are themselves resolved against this resolver.
1185    * Triggered eagerly in the constructor so the result is available in the bean store before
1186    * {@link Config} and annotation work are initialized.
1187    */
1188   // @formatter:off
1189   private final Memoizer<VarResolver> bootstrapVarResolver = memoizer(() -> {
1190      var bs = beanStore();
1191      Holder<VarResolver> v = Holder.of(
1192         VarResolver.create()
1193            .defaultVars()
1194            .defaultFunctions()
1195            .vars(VarList.of(
1196               ConfigVar.class, FileVar.class, LocalizationVar.class,
1197               RequestAttributeVar.class, RequestFormDataVar.class, RequestHeaderVar.class,
1198               RequestPathVar.class, RequestQueryVar.class, RequestVar.class,
1199               RequestSwaggerVar.class, SerializedRequestAttrVar.class, ServletInitParamVar.class,
1200               SwaggerVar.class, OpenApiVar.class, UrlVar.class, UrlEncodeVar.class, HtmlWidgetVar.class
1201            ).addDefault())
1202            .bean(FileFinder.class, FileFinder.create(bs).cp(resourceClass(), null, true).build())
1203            .build()
1204      );
1205      bs.createBeanFromMethod(VarResolver.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver)).ifPresent(v::set);
1206      return v.get();
1207   });
1208   // @formatter:on
1209
1210   /**
1211    * The {@link CallLogger} for this resource.
1212    *
1213    * <p>
1214    * Defaults to {@link BasicCallLogger}. {@code @Rest(callLogger=X)} most-derived non-{@code Void} class wins.
1215    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
1216    */
1217   private final Memoizer<CallLogger> callLogger = memoizer(() -> {
1218      var bs = beanStore();
1219      // Test-installed beans (registered via Args.beanStoreConfigurer / addSupplier) live in the
1220      // bean store's entries deque and are returned by bs.getBean(CallLogger.class) before falling
1221      // through to this memoizer's default supplier (which is what the @Rest(callLogger) chain
1222      // produces).  The memoizer therefore only needs to produce the framework default.
1223      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(CallLogger.class, bs).type(BasicCallLogger.class).noBuilder();
1224      bs.getBeanType(CallLogger.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
1225      // @Rest(callLogger=X) — most-derived non-Void wins.
1226      // getRestAnnotationsForProperty(...) yields parent-to-child order (rstream reversal); reduce-last
1227      // keeps the most-derived value, mirroring the prior "apply each annotation, child overrides parent" semantics.
1228      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_callLogger)
1229         .map(ai -> ai.inner().callLogger())
1230         .filter(c -> c != CallLogger.Void.class)
1231         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1232         .ifPresent(creator::type);
1233      bs.createBeanFromMethod(CallLogger.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
1234      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
1235   });
1236
1237   /**
1238    * The locally-resolved {@link RestAuthenticator} for this resource, if any.
1239    *
1240    * <p>
1241    * Resolution precedence (highest first, per design spec &sect;5.3):
1242    * <ol>
1243    *    <li>Registered bean &mdash; {@code beanStore().getBean(RestAuthenticator.class)}.
1244    *    <li>{@code @Rest(authenticator=X)} &mdash; instantiated via the bean store (constructor injection).
1245    *    <li>{@code @Bean} factory method on the resource.
1246    *    <li>{@link RestServlet#createAuthenticator(BeanStore)} override.
1247    * </ol>
1248    * The {@link RestAuthenticator.Null} sentinel is treated as &quot;unset.&quot;
1249    */
1250   private final Memoizer<Optional<RestAuthenticator>> localAuthenticator = memoizer(() -> {
1251      var bs = beanStore();
1252      var bean = bs.getBean(RestAuthenticator.class).orElse(null);
1253      if (bean != null)
1254         return o(bean);
1255      var annoClass = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_authenticator)
1256         .map(ai -> ai.inner().authenticator())
1257         .filter(x -> x != RestAuthenticator.Null.class)
1258         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1259         .orElse(null);
1260      if (annoClass != null)
1261         return o(BeanInstantiator.of(RestAuthenticator.class, bs).type(annoClass).noBuilder().run());
1262      var fromMethod = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestAuthenticator.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).orElse(null);
1263      if (fromMethod != null)
1264         return o(fromMethod);
1265      if (resource().get() instanceof RestServlet rs) {
1266         var fromOverride = rs.createAuthenticator(bs);
1267         if (fromOverride != null)
1268            return o(fromOverride);
1269      }
1270      return Optional.<RestAuthenticator>empty();
1271   });
1272
1273   /**
1274    * The effective root-to-this {@link RestAuthenticator} list, honoring {@code noInherit={"authenticator"}}.
1275    *
1276    * <p>
1277    * Unlike guards (which are child-isolated), authenticators inherit down the child-resource tree: the parent
1278    * context's effective list is prepended (root first), then this resource's local authenticator is appended.
1279    * A {@code @Rest(noInherit={"authenticator"})} on this resource cuts off the parent walk (subtree opt-out).
1280    */
1281   private final Memoizer<List<RestAuthenticator>> effectiveAuthenticators = memoizer(() -> {
1282      var l = new ArrayList<RestAuthenticator>();
1283      var pc = parentContext();
1284      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_authenticator) && pc != null)
1285         l.addAll(pc.getEffectiveAuthenticators());
1286      localAuthenticator.get().ifPresent(l::add);
1287      return u(l);
1288   });
1289
1290   /**
1291    * Returns the effective (root-to-this) authenticator chain for this resource.
1292    *
1293    * @return The effective authenticator chain, never <jk>null</jk>; may be empty.
1294    * @since 10.0.0
1295    */
1296   public List<RestAuthenticator> getEffectiveAuthenticators() {
1297      return effectiveAuthenticators.get();
1298   }
1299
1300   /**
1301    * Runs the effective authenticator chain for this request, folding results and applying the resolved
1302    * principal/roles to the {@link RestRequest}.
1303    *
1304    * <p>
1305    * Invoked by {@link RestSession} before {@code preCall}.  When no authenticators are configured this is a
1306    * no-op (anonymous passthrough).  Each authenticator's {@link AuthenticationException} propagates to abort
1307    * the request with a {@code 401}.
1308    *
1309    * @param session The op session for this request.
1310    * @throws AuthenticationException If credentials are present but invalid.
1311    * @since 10.0.0
1312    */
1313   protected void authenticate(RestOpSession session) throws AuthenticationException {
1314      var auths = getEffectiveAuthenticators();
1315      if (auths.isEmpty())
1316         return;
1317      var req = session.getRequest();
1318      var acc = new AuthResultAccumulator();
1319      // Seed the fold with any pre-existing identity (container security or a servlet-layer AuthFilterChain) so
1320      // roles-only ADD results from resource authenticators augment it instead of being dropped (spec §5.6/§5.7).
1321      // A later REPLACE result still overrides this seed (the accumulator resets principal+roles on REPLACE).
1322      var existing = req.getUserPrincipal();
1323      if (existing != null)
1324         acc.add(AuthResult.of(existing));
1325      for (var a : auths)
1326         a.authenticate(req).ifPresent(acc::add);  // RestRequest is-a HttpServletRequest; AuthenticationException propagates -> 401
1327      acc.result().ifPresent(req::setAuthResult);
1328   }
1329
1330   /**
1331    * The resolving {@link Config} for this resource.
1332    *
1333    * <p>
1334    * Wraps the builder's unresolved config with a {@link VarResolver} session so that SVL variables
1335    * in config values are expanded on access.
1336    */
1337   private final Memoizer<Config> config = memoizer(() -> rawConfig.get().resolving(getVarResolver().createSession()));
1338
1339   /**
1340    * The supported request content types ({@code Content-Type} media types) for this resource.
1341    *
1342    * <p>
1343    * Walks {@code @Rest(consumes)} annotations parent-to-child and returns the union. When no annotation
1344    * declares types, falls back to the intersection of all op-level parser supported media types.
1345    */
1346   private final Memoizer<List<MediaType>> consumes = memoizer(() -> {
1347      // Walk @Rest(consumes=...) chain (parent-to-child); concat all entries in chain order.
1348      var fromAnnotations = new ArrayList<MediaType>();
1349      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_consumes)
1350         .forEach(ai -> stream(ai.inner().consumes()).map(MediaType::of).forEach(fromAnnotations::add));
1351      if (! fromAnnotations.isEmpty())
1352         return u(fromAnnotations);
1353      // Fall back to the intersection of opContexts' parser-supported media types — matches legacy behavior.
1354      var opContexts = restOperations().getOpContexts();
1355      Set<MediaType> s = opContexts.isEmpty() ? emptySet() : toSet(opContexts.get(0).getParsers().getSupportedMediaTypes());
1356      opContexts.forEach(x -> s.retainAll(x.getParsers().getSupportedMediaTypes()));
1357      return u(toList(s));
1358   });
1359
1360   //---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1361   // @Value-injected env-driven defaults
1362   //
1363   // Populated by ClassInfo.of(this).inject(this, beanStore) during construction; consumed by the
1364   // memoizer lambdas below (which run lazily, i.e. after injection has completed). Each field
1365   // is the env-driven default that flows into mergeReplacedStringAttribute / mergeReplacedBooleanAttribute
1366   // as the initial value before the @Rest annotation chain is walked.
1367   //---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1368
1369   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(debugDefault)}; consumed by the {@link #debugEnablement} memoizer. */
1370   @Value("${RestContext.debugDefault:}")
1371   private String defaultDebugDefault;
1372
1373   /** Env-driven default for the call-logger debug level fallback in the {@link #debugConfig} memoizer. */
1374   @Value("${juneau.restLogger.level:INFO}")
1375   private String defaultDebugLevel;
1376
1377   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(allowedHeaderParams)}. */
1378   @Value("${RestContext.allowedHeaderParams:Accept,Content-Type}")
1379   private String defaultAllowedHeaderParams;
1380
1381   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(allowedMethodHeaders)}. */
1382   @Value("${RestContext.allowedMethodHeaders:}")
1383   private String defaultAllowedMethodHeaders;
1384
1385   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(allowedMethodParams)}. */
1386   @Value("${RestContext.allowedMethodParams:HEAD,OPTIONS}")
1387   private String defaultAllowedMethodParams;
1388
1389   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(disableContentParam)}. */
1390   @Value("${RestContext.disableContentParam:false}")
1391   private boolean defaultDisableContentParam;
1392
1393   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(renderResponseStackTraces)}. */
1394   @Value("${RestContext.renderResponseStackTraces:false}")
1395   private boolean defaultRenderResponseStackTraces;
1396
1397   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(problemDetails)}. */
1398   @Value("${RestContext.problemDetails:false}")
1399   private boolean defaultProblemDetails;
1400
1401   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(virtualThreads)}. */
1402   @Value("${RestContext.virtualThreads:false}")
1403   private boolean defaultVirtualThreads;
1404
1405   /**
1406    * Env-driven default controlling whether the {@link TraceContextResponseProcessor} is registered so the
1407    * server writes W3C {@code traceparent} / {@code tracestate} response headers when a {@link TracerHook} is
1408    * active. Defaults to {@code true} (on-when-tracer); set {@code RestContext.responseTraceparent=false}
1409    * to keep the processor out of the chain entirely.
1410    */
1411   @Value("${RestContext.responseTraceparent:true}")
1412   private boolean defaultResponseTraceparent;
1413
1414   /**
1415    * Env-driven default controlling whether {@link MdcAsyncListener} propagates
1416    * the request thread's SLF4J MDC map to {@link CompletableFuture} completion threads
1417    * Defaults to {@code true} (on when SLF4J is detected). Set
1418    * {@code RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation=false} to disable globally, or call
1419    * {@link Builder#mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean)} per resource.
1420    */
1421   @Value("${RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation:true}")
1422   private boolean defaultMdcAsyncPropagation;
1423
1424   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(eagerInit)}. */
1425   @Value("${RestContext.eagerInit:false}")
1426   private boolean defaultEagerInit;
1427
1428   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(lazyChildren)}: deferred child construction opt-in. */
1429   @Value("${RestContext.lazyChildren:false}")
1430   private boolean defaultLazyChildren;
1431
1432   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(clientVersionHeader)}. */
1433   @Value("${RestContext.clientVersionHeader:Client-Version}")
1434   private String defaultClientVersionHeader;
1435
1436   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriRelativity)}; resolves to empty string when unset (treated as "no default"). */
1437   @Value("${RestContext.uriRelativity:}")
1438   private String defaultUriRelativity;
1439
1440   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriAuthority)}; {@link Optional#empty()} when unset (preserves null-vs-empty distinction). */
1441   @Value("${RestContext.uriAuthority}")
1442   private Optional<String> defaultUriAuthority;
1443
1444   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriContext)}; {@link Optional#empty()} when unset (preserves null-vs-empty distinction). */
1445   @Value("${RestContext.uriContext}")
1446   private Optional<String> defaultUriContext;
1447
1448   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriResolution)}; resolves to empty string when unset (treated as "no default"). */
1449   @Value("${RestContext.uriResolution:}")
1450   private String defaultUriResolution;
1451
1452   /**
1453    * The {@link DebugEnablement} for this resource.
1454    *
1455    * <p>
1456    * Resolved from {@code @Rest(debugDefault)} (most-derived non-blank wins), falling back to
1457    * {@code @Rest(debug=true|false)}. The resolved {@link Enablement} is published into the bean store
1458    * so that {@link BasicDebugEnablement} subclasses can pick it up. Defaults to {@link BasicDebugEnablement}.
1459    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
1460    */
1461   private final Memoizer<DebugEnablement> debugEnablement = memoizer(() -> {
1462      // @Rest(debugDefault="ALWAYS|NEVER|CONDITIONAL") — most-derived non-blank value wins, with parent inheritance
1463      // gated by @Rest(noInherit={"debugDefault"}). Resolved value is published as an Enablement bean so that
1464      // BasicDebugEnablement.init() (and any subclass) can pick it up via beanStore().getBean(Enablement.class).
1465      // Annotation value overrides any pre-registered Enablement bean (e.g. mock-client default).
1466      // If neither a debugDefault annotation value NOR a pre-registered Enablement bean is present, fall back
1467      // to the @Rest(debug=true|false) boolean flag — ALWAYS when set, NEVER otherwise.
1468      var bs = beanStore();
1469      String debugDefaultStr = mergeReplacedStringAttribute(PROPERTY_debugDefault, defaultDebugDefault);
1470      Enablement resolvedDebugDefault = null;
1471      if (nn(debugDefaultStr) && !debugDefaultStr.isBlank())
1472         resolvedDebugDefault = Enablement.fromString(debugDefaultStr);
1473      if (nn(resolvedDebugDefault))
1474         bs.addBean(Enablement.class, resolvedDebugDefault);
1475      else if (bs.getBean(Enablement.class).isEmpty())
1476         bs.addBean(Enablement.class, isDebug() ? Enablement.ALWAYS : Enablement.NEVER);
1477      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(DebugEnablement.class, bs).type(BasicDebugEnablement.class).noBuilder();
1478      bs.getBeanType(DebugEnablement.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
1479      bs.createBeanFromMethod(DebugEnablement.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
1480      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
1481   });
1482
1483   /**
1484    * The {@link DebugConfig} for this resource.
1485    */
1486   private final Memoizer<DebugConfig> debugConfig = memoizer(() -> {
1487      var bs = beanStore();
1488      var mode = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_debug)
1489         .map(ai -> resolve(ai.inner().debug().value()))
1490         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
1491         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1492         .orElse("");
1493      var formatType = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_debug)
1494         .map(ai -> ai.inner().debug().format())
1495         .filter(c -> c != DebugFormat.Void.class)
1496         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1497         .orElse(null);
1498      var levelStr = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_debug)
1499         .map(ai -> resolve(ai.inner().debug().level()))
1500         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
1501         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1502         .orElse("");
1503      var format = formatType == null ? new BasicTextFormat() : BeanInstantiator.of(DebugFormat.class, bs).type(formatType).run();
1504      var level = StringUtils.isNotBlank(levelStr) ? Level.parse(levelStr) : Level.parse(defaultDebugLevel);
1505      var mode2 = mode;
1506      return new DebugConfig(bs) {
1507         @Override
1508         public DebugResult resolve(RestContext context, HttpServletRequest req) {
1509            var enabled = isTrue(cast(Boolean.class, req.getAttribute("Debug")));
1510            if (!enabled) {
1511               if ("always".equalsIgnoreCase(mode2) || "true".equalsIgnoreCase(mode2))
1512                  enabled = true;
1513               else if ("conditional".equalsIgnoreCase(mode2))
1514                  enabled = "true".equalsIgnoreCase(req.getHeader("Debug"));
1515            }
1516            var cacheBodies = enabled;
1517            return new DebugResult(enabled, format, level, cacheBodies);
1518         }
1519
1520         @Override
1521         public DebugResult resolve(RestOpContext context, HttpServletRequest req) {
1522            var opDebug = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(RestOp.class, MethodInfo.of(context.getJavaMethod())).stream().findFirst();
1523            if (opDebug.isPresent()) {
1524               var v = RestContext.this.resolve(opDebug.get().inner().debug().value());
1525               if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(v)) {
1526                  if ("always".equalsIgnoreCase(v) || "true".equalsIgnoreCase(v))
1527                     return new DebugResult(true, format, level, true);
